description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal shipping container with a weathered, dark green exterior and visible rust patches throughout its surface. The sides feature corrugated metal panels for structural strength, and there are faded white stenciled markings and a prominent blue and red logo with Cyrillic text, suggesting it is used for industrial or freight purposes. The top is flat and solid, showing additional signs of rust and wear. The container appears to be fully enclosed, with no visible windows or open sections, and the doors are not clearly shown but are likely located on one of the shorter ends. The overall construction is robust, designed to withstand outdoor conditions and heavy handling. This type of container is commonly found in shipping yards, construction sites, or as temporary storage in urban environments.
description: A large, weathered green metal shipping container with rust patches, corrugated sides, and faded industrial markings and logos.
description_view_0: End view showing a flat, rusted green panel with white stenciled markings and no visible doors or openings.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the corrugated green surface, heavy rust, and a large blue and red logo with Cyrillic text.
description_view_2: Opposite end view similar to view 0, with additional white stenciled markings and visible rust.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, again showing the large logo and extensive rust on the corrugated surface.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: large blue and red logo with Cyrillic text on both long sides, white stenciled markings on short ends
